---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new calculator for Energy Bill Lab
title: '[FEAT]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when trying to estimate HVAC power cost...").

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Utility / Rate Data Requirements

Does this feature require electricity tariff data, EIA monthly state rates, or custom appliance wattage specifications?

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, UI sketches, or references here.
